name: Roblox Corp
summary: Roblox Corp operates an online entertainment platform that allows users to create, share, and play experiences built by other users and developers. The platform features Roblox Studio, a creation tool, and Robux, a virtual currency used for transactions. Roblox connects millions of daily active users globally across gaming, social interaction, and user-generated content, with creators able to monetize their experiences through the platform's economy.

products.name: Roblox Platform
products.description: Online entertainment platform where users play, create, and share user-generated experiences.

products.name: Roblox Studio
products.description: Creation tool enabling developers and creators to build and publish experiences on the Roblox platform.

products.name: Robux
products.description: Virtual currency used within the Roblox platform for purchases and creator monetization.

products.name: Creator Store
products.description: Marketplace within Roblox where creators can access and share assets for building experiences.
